h172bb363ga6bdg46b6g8f17g60fd7e6c9b8c: *His breaths are shallow, his wounds deep. He doesn't respond to your voice.*
h4b18cf93g1e27g409fga0d0gbbcfed36d7d0: Peace is returning to the grove. We have you to thank for that.
h8d9301f6gaeabg422cg8c82g61b4a30074fc: From what I hear, you're making a habit of slaying goblins.
h2e8c0007g319fg4344ga9degf465cf63f975: My saviour. I wish you could have visited in better times.
h30b8afa1g8bf7g472ag898fg64329ac45163: Oh, thank you, thank you. I thought I was going to die down here.
h0e5b5386g26a7g4d73g8aa9g58ef29f2f46b: How did those goblins slip into the grove?
h6cf5da1fg38a5g4fa5g88a3gd6151e3529d8: It's my fault. I thought I'd given them the slip, but they followed me through the tunnel back there.
h476de8d7g364bg4ea7g9510g25038b204616: I must tell the others what happened. Step careful - there are traps in these tunnels. And thank you again.
hb1e71fd8g94f6g4b54ga730gb2caf5d92946: Was no one looking for you?
hcfc4cd0egf866g4782gbea3g80a64477a7ad: No. I'd still be outside gathering herbs if I hadn't run into the goblins.
hb40fb282gf520g451dga2c8gacf814a1959b: I'm surprised the goblins didn't gut you on sight. Why didn't they?
hf7ef300eg1acbg454ega4c6g6cb450898397: They were asking questions - about a weapon.
hd243c18cg01afg4d2dg9c63g309e4db0ea80: I told them - the only weapons here are the ones the tieflings brought.
h72dcafb1g538ag4e90gb011ge777731e4a3d: I told them - the only weapons here are the ones the foulbloods brought.
h1b55f40dg897bg4913g806fgf54dbd242957: Don't thank me yet. I'm here to finish what they started.
